mapper.sql: id, title, content, notice_status, publisher_id, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: select from notice where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into notice(title, content, notice_status, publisher_id, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{title}, #{content}, #{noticeStatus}, #{publisherId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: update notice set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, notice_status = #{noticeStatus}, publisher_id = #{publisherId}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update notice set deleted = 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
